titleStmt.title: SII 25.51: original edition by M. D. Sampath
No. 51. (A.R. No. 51 of 1908.) VAḺUVŪR, WANDIWASH TALUK, NORTH ARCOT DISTRICT.

summary.p: South wall of the central shrine in the Brahmapurīśvara temple.
The inscription commences with the praśasti, Maduraiyum Pāṇḍiyaṉmuḍit-talaiyuṅ-koṇḍ-aruḷiya etc., of the king.

It records a gift of six sandhi-lamps to the deity Tiruvayaṉīśuramuḍaiya-nāyaṉār of Vaḻugūr in Irumbāḍu-nāḍu in Veṇkuṉṟak-kōṭṭam in Jayaṅgoṇḍaśōḻa-maṇḍalam by Kālakāladēva, son of Umā, a dēvaraḍiyār of the temple. The Śivabrāhmaṇas of the temple received 18 paḻaṅkāśu, evidently from Kāla-kāladēva himself, for maintaining the above endowment.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tiripuvaṉaccakkaravarttikaḷ maturaiyum pāṇṭiyaṉ muṭittalaiyuṅ koṇṭaruḷiya śrī kulottuṅka coḻadevaṟku yāṇṭu 2 10 7vatu jayaṅkoṇṭa coḻa maṇṭapattu
veṇkuṇṟak koṭṭattu Irum pāṭunāṭṭu vaḻukūr Āḷuṭaiyār tiruvayanicuramuṭaiyār koyilil tirumaṭai viḷākattu Irukkum tevaraṭiyā
rāṉa Umai makaṉ kālakāla tevaṉ Iṉnāyaṉāṟku caṉti viḷakku Āṟu Iv viḷakkāṟukkum Ikkoyil kāṇi Uṭaiya civabrāhma roṅ kaik
koṇṭa naṟpaḻaṅkācu 10 8 Ippaḻaṅkācu patineṭṭuṅkaik koṇṭu Iccaṉti viḷakkāṟuñ candrādityavarai celuttak kaṭavomikkoyiṟ kāṇi Uṭaiya civabrāhmaṇarom .
—kku taṇṭecura prasādamākak kuṭuttaruḷiṉa paṉṉira lil kiḻakku 3 100 7 10m co vittu Ippaṭi potika Ikkoyil muta
—ṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai koyil kaṇakku nitta viṉōtapaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 25.51 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
